title: pongamia mitis
intro: Pongamia mitis, also known as Pongam or Karanj, is a tropical tree native to India, Australia, and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The leaves, seeds, and bark of the Pongamia mitis plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pongamia mitis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of asthma and allergies. Pongamia mitis is often prepared in herbal form, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
